expected_effect: Widen quote-map coverage with a true topology branch that can preserve anti-arb protection while cutting unnecessary calm-path fee spend.
expected_failure_signature: If the router flips too eagerly, the branch replays the cheap-mode arb leak seen in earlier quote-map experiments.
expected_win_condition: Keep the raw anchor anti-arb improvement while routing calm flow into a cheaper neutral or refill lane often enough to clear the promotion margin.
hidden_coupling_removed: Safe-side refill should not be implicitly blended into the same continuous quote map that arms toxic protection.
rationale: Swap the replayed three-lane quote assembly for a regime-switched router that picks between toxic, neutral, and refill lanes from state rather than blending all three continuously.
title: Regime switchboard router
why_not_coefficient_retune: This changes how the quote is assembled across regimes instead of retuning the weights inside the existing three-channel replay.
